title: Additional Field Input
description: Typed descriptor for the kind of value an additional field accepts, plus optional validation hints. Discriminated by the `type` property. V1 supports `text`, `multiline_text`, `boolean`, `date`, and `choice`.

type.description: Input kind. V1 supports `text`, `multiline_text`, `boolean`, `date`, and `choice`. Future input types require a future UCP version or extension.

min_length.description: Inclusive minimum length, counted in Unicode code points after JSON decoding. Validation hint only — the business is authoritative.

max_length.description: Inclusive maximum length, counted in Unicode code points after JSON decoding. Validation hint only.

pattern.description: ECMA-262 regular expression the value is expected to match when present. Validation hint only — the business is authoritative. If the platform's regex engine cannot express or correctly evaluate the pattern, the platform SHOULD skip client-side validation and rely on business-side validation.

min_length.description: Inclusive minimum length, counted in Unicode code points after JSON decoding. Validation hint only.

max_length.description: Inclusive maximum length, counted in Unicode code points after JSON decoding. Validation hint only.

oneOf.title: Boolean Input
oneOf.description: Boolean input. The submitted `value` is a JSON boolean (`true` or `false`); `null` represents an untouched state, which is distinct from a deliberately-declined `false`. For consent-style use cases where the buyer must affirmatively accept, the business rejects a submitted `false` with `code: additional_field_invalid_value`.

oneOf.title: Date Input
oneOf.description: Calendar-date input. Values are serialized as RFC 3339 full-date strings (`YYYY-MM-DD`) and represent the buyer's local calendar day. Businesses are authoritative for validation; if a business needs a specific timezone (e.g., fulfillment warehouse local time), it SHOULD state that in the field's `description`.

min.description: Inclusive earliest accepted date (RFC 3339 full-date). Validation hint only.

max.description: Inclusive latest accepted date (RFC 3339 full-date). Validation hint only.

oneOf.title: Choice Input
oneOf.description: Single-select input constrained to a closed set of allowed option values.

options.description: Ordered list of allowed options. The submitted value MUST match one of the `value` entries. Exact-duplicate entries are rejected by the schema; businesses are additionally authoritative for ensuring `value` uniqueness across entries that differ only by display fields like `label`.

value.description: The canonical value submitted for this option. Stable across locales and unique within the option list.

label.description: Resolved localized display label for this option. Plain text.
